context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements the full Magento cart lifecycle: creating a guest cart, adding both simple and configurable products (with parent_sku), persisting the cart ID in a cookie, authenticating customers, using the correct query for the authenticated cart, and merging the guest cart after login.

checklist.name: createEmptyCart mutation
checklist.description: Guest cart creation uses the `createEmptyCart` mutation (not a REST endpoint or other method)

checklist.name: addSimpleProductsToCart mutation
checklist.description: Adding a simple product uses the `addSimpleProductsToCart` mutation

checklist.name: addConfigurableProductsToCart mutation
checklist.description: Adding a configurable product uses the `addConfigurableProductsToCart` mutation (not `addSimpleProductsToCart`)

checklist.name: parent_sku in configurable add
checklist.description: The `addConfigurableProductsToCart` call includes both `parent_sku` (the parent configurable SKU) AND the variant `sku` in `data`

checklist.name: Cart ID in cookie
checklist.description: The guest cart ID (UUID) is stored and retrieved from a cookie â€” NOT from localStorage or a JavaScript variable only

checklist.name: generateCustomerToken mutation
checklist.description: Customer login uses the `generateCustomerToken` mutation to obtain a bearer token

checklist.name: customerCart query for auth cart
checklist.description: Fetching the authenticated customer's cart uses the `customerCart` query (not `cart(cart_id: ...)` with a cart ID parameter)

checklist.name: mergeCarts mutation
checklist.description: After login, the guest cart is merged into the customer cart using the `mergeCarts` mutation with `source_cart_id` and `destination_cart_id`

checklist.name: Guest cart cookie cleared after merge
checklist.description: After `mergeCarts`, the guest cart ID cookie is deleted/cleared

checklist.name: Cart prices in response
checklist.description: Cart query responses include `prices` with `grand_total` or `subtotal_excluding_tax` fields

checklist.name: Customer orders sort
checklist.description: If order history is fetched, it uses `sort: { sort_field: CREATED_AT, sort_direction: DESC }`

checklist.name: Bearer token passed for auth requests
checklist.description: Authenticated requests (customerCart, orders) pass the bearer token in the Authorization header
